## Welcome to DeepSeek Autocomplete

Get AI-powered code completions using DeepSeek's Fill-in-the-Middle API.

### 1. Set your API Key
Open Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`) and run **DeepSeek Autocomplete: Set API Key**.

Your key is stored securely in your OS keychain.

### 2. Start coding
Open any supported file — suggestions appear as ghost text while you type.

**Supported languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, Go, Rust, C/C++, C#, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, Scala, Lua, SQL, and more.

### 3. Accept or dismiss
| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| **Tab** | Accept the ghost text |
| **Escape** | Dismiss |
| **Ctrl+Shift+.** | Toggle completions on/off |
| **Ctrl+Right** | Accept word-by-word |
| **Ctrl+Space** | Show multiple alternatives (when invoked) |

### 4. Customize
Open settings (`Ctrl+,`) and search for `deepseekFim` to configure:
- Model selection (flash for speed, pro for quality)
- Temperature and max tokens
- Debounce delay
- Multi-line behavior
- Trigger mode (automatic vs manual)

### Need help?
- [DeepSeek API Docs](https://api-docs.deepseek.com)
- [Get an API Key](https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys)
- Report issues on [GitHub](https://github.com/andyanamafaza/deepseek-fim-auto-complete)
